hero.title: we optimize IT for you
hero.description: As technology grows more complex, managing it effectively becomes critical to staying competitive. Artha Mitra Interdata partners with you to take control of your IT infrastructure and security, improving efficiency, reducing risk, and enabling sustainable growth.

howItWorks.title: How We Optimize IT For You

left.title: Building Resilient & Future-Ready IT Solutions
left.description: At Artha Mitra Interdata, optimizing IT means ensuring that technology consistently supports and strengthens your business objectives. We work closely with our customers as trusted partners, taking the time to understand their priorities so that every solution we design delivers practical, measurable value. From infrastructure to security, our focus is on building IT environments that are stable, efficient, and able to adapt as your business evolves.

right.title: Aligned IT With Your Business Goals
right.description: Our approach is guided by a clear vision to become the technology partner of choice, and a mission to help customers achieve their competitive goals through strong leadership and professional service. Guided by our core values of Commitment, Integrity, Professionalism, Teamwork, and Advancement (CIPTA), we cultivate a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement. These principles shape how we engage, how we deliver, and how we help our customers transform IT into a sustained competitive advantage.

howItWorks.description:
At Artha Mitra Interdata, optimizing IT means ensuring that technology consistently supports and strengthens your business objectives. We work closely with our customers as trusted partners, taking the time to understand their priorities so that every solution we design delivers practical, measurable value. From infrastructure to security, our focus is on building IT environments that are stable, efficient, and able to adapt as your business evolves.

Our approach is guided by a clear vision to become the technology partner of choice, and a mission to help customers achieve their competitive goals through strong leadership and professional service. Guided by our core values of Commitment, Integrity, Professionalism, Teamwork, and Advancement (CIPTA), we cultivate a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement. These principles shape how we engage, how we deliver, and how we help our customers transform IT into a sustained competitive advantage.

values.title: Commitment
values.description: We understand the importance of delivering on our promises and are dedicated to excellence in completing the tasks at hand.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We abide to a set of moral standards that is unwavering and steadfast - we always look to do the right thing.

values.title: Professionalism
values.description: We believe in our competence and seek to achieve the best results in all that we do.

values.title: Teamwork
values.description: Understanding that synergy enables us to achieve more, we always collaborate in formulating the optimum solution.

values.title: Advancement
values.description: Encapsulating our vision and purpose as a company, we ensure every delivery provides tangible value that advances the business.

tabs.label: Solutions

items.name: Network Security
items.description: Defending networks from threats, intrusion, and unauthorized access.

items.name: Data Security
items.description: Protecting sensitive data at rest, in transit, and in use.

items.name: Application Security
items.description: Securing applications across development, deployment, and runtime.

items.name: Endpoint Security
items.description: Hardening endpoints to prevent malware and lateral movement.

items.name: Information Security
items.description: Establishing controls to safeguard information assets.

items.name: Security Management
items.description: Monitoring, managing, and improving security operations.

items.name: Cloud Security
items.description: Securing cloud workloads, identities, and configurations.

tabs.description: We offer a wide range of solutions centered on IT Infrastructure and Security, designed to maximize impact and value to your business. Our solutions cover everything from network hardware and software to advanced security measures, bandwidth optimization, and communication systems.

tabs.label: Services

items.name: Assessment
items.description: Baseline review to identify gaps, risks, and priorities.

items.name: Design
items.description: Security architecture and solution design tailored to needs.

items.name: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Ongoing monitoring, updates, and technical assistance.

items.name: Training
items.description: Hands-on enablement for teams and administrators.

items.name: Security Audit
items.description: Audit readiness, compliance checks, and remediation guidance.

items.name: Asset Disposal Service
items.description: Secure decommissioning and disposal of IT assets.

items.name: Awareness Event
items.description: Programs to build security culture and user awareness.

tabs.description: We offer a wide range of services centered on IT Infrastructure and Security, designed to maximize impact and value to your business. Our services are aimed at optimizing IT, enabling and extending to further achieve your organizational objectives and success.

items.text: PT Artha Mitra Interdata is the kind of integrator partner every company hopes for. They're committed, they're reliable, and they actually care about the results as much as we do. At PT Sysware Indonesia, we value expertise and transparency, and PT Artha Mitra Interdata always delivers both with a great attitude every single time.
items.author: Mr. Tonny Lim
items.role: President Director of PT Sysware Indonesia

items.text: Our Partnership with PT Artha Mitra Interdata represents the ideal convergence of security and scalability. Beyond the technology, this relationship is rooted in deep-seated business commitment and mutual trust; values that are indispensable in today's volatile digital landscape. We especially recognize PT Artha Mitra Interdata's unwavering commitment to deliver our security suite with precision and integrity. Their team consistently goes beyond mere sales, ensuring that our solutions are implemented and optimised to solve each and every client's unique challenges. By aligning our long-term visions and leveraging their excellence in service delivery, we empower enterprises with the confidence to grow, knowing their security infrastructure are fortified by industry-leading standards and a partnership that stands the test of time.
items.author: Mr. Susanto Lee
items.role: President Director of PT Secure Pasifik Teknologi

news.title: News & Articles
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest in IT security and technology

items.title: IT Security Spending to Reach $96 Billion in 2018
items.excerpt: Gartner predicts that worldwide security spend will reach $96 billion dollars, up 8% from the previous year. The latest figures show substantial increases reflecting the growing importance of cybersecurity in modern enterprises.

items.title: The Real Reason You're Failing at PCI DSS Compliance
items.excerpt: IT organizations don't struggle with PCI DSS compliance due to a lack of knowledge or technology. The problem is proficiency. With years of data breach investigation reports, patterns start to become clear.

items.title: DDI is a Critical Component of IoT Success
items.excerpt: The Internet of Things era has arrived, and businesses need to be prepared for a world where everything is connected. There are currently 25 billion internet-connected devices, and that will double by 2025.

items.title: Fighting Automation with Automation
items.excerpt: Disruptions caused by autonomous malware could have devastating implications. As attackers leverage automation, defenders must also adopt automated threat detection and response capabilities to keep pace.
